name: MSME Competitive (LEAN) Scheme
administered_by: Ministry of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises (implemented via Quality Council of India and National Productivity Council)
retrieval_text: Non-credit consultancy subsidy under the MSME Champions umbrella: the government funds 90% of handholding and consultancy fees for MSMEs adopting LEAN manufacturing tools (5S, Kaizen, Kanban, visual workplace, Poka-Yoke) to reach Basic, Intermediate, or Advanced LEAN certification levels. An additional 5% government contribution applies to SFURTI-cluster units and to units owned by women or SC/ST entrepreneurs or located in the North Eastern Region; a further 5% applies to units registering through industry associations or OEM organisations. This scheme has no loan component; it reimburses consultancy costs directly and carries no interest rate.
documents_required: Bank Account Proof (Cancelled Cheque or Bank Passbook front page)
Board Resolution (for Companies/LLPs) or Partnership Deed (for Partnership Firms) or Proprietorship Declaration (for Proprietorships)
Invoice/Bill from QCI/NPC/LEAN Consultant for LEAN services
Proof of Payment to QCI/NPC/LEAN Consultant (Bank statement copy/UTR details)
Proof of eligibility for additional 5% Government Contribution
